_about: Pointer to the Aiki-GeNano Zenodo deposit accompanying the mAbs (submitted, 2026) paper. The deposit ships only numerical figure data and per-sequence computed property tables (sequences stripped). The four trained model checkpoints (SFT, DPO, GDPO_DPO, GDPO_SFT) and the underlying screening dataset are NOT in the deposit; they are available from partnerships@aikium.com under NDA.
_concept_vs_record: concept_* always resolves to the latest version on Zenodo and is the DOI to cite from bioRxiv / the journal. record_* pins the specific deposit version evaluated in the paper.

deposit_contents.figure_data/: per-figure aggregates and per-position derivatives covering all 64 evaluated targets
deposit_contents.full_property_tables/: per-sequence computed properties for the 10 disclosed GPCR targets (amino-acid sequences stripped)
deposit_contents._strip_sequences.py: audit-able recipe used to produce the deposit

_note_on_legacy_downloader: scripts/download_checkpoints.sh was written for an earlier plan that distributed checkpoints via Zenodo. That plan was superseded; the script is retained as documentation of the intended manifest format and will print a clear redirect message when invoked.
